final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to deploy a MySQL RDS instance (db.r5.large) with Provisioned IOPS (io1)
  into a dedicated VPC. The VPC contains two private subnets in different Availability Zones,
  a DB subnet group for multi-AZ deployment, a security group that restricts inbound access
  on port 3306 to internal VPC traffic, and a Secrets Manager secret for securely storing
  the RDS master user password.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2"

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for MySQL RDS instance deployed across two private subnets"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup"

  RDSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for MySQL RDS instance allowing inbound MySQL traffic from within the VPC"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSecurityGroup"

  MyRDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSMasterPassword"
      Description: "Secret for the RDS master user password"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        ExcludePunctuation: true
        PasswordLength: 16

  MySQLRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MySQLInstance"
      AllocatedStorage: 100
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      Engine: MySQL
      EngineVersion: "8.0.44"
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${MyRDSSecret}:SecretString:password}}"
      MultiAZ: true
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: 1000
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSecurityGroup.GroupId
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DeletionProtection: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MySQLRDSInstance"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template that creates a MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with automated backups,
  deployed in a VPC with public subnets across two Availability Zones. The template includes basic
  networking (VPC, Internet Gateway, Public Subnets, Route Table) and associates the RDS instance with a DBSubnetGroup and Security Group.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-1"
        - Key: Network
          Value: Public

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-2"
        - Key: Network
          Value: Public

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RDSDBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for RDS instance"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup"

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security Group for RDS MySQL instance allowing inbound MySQL traffic"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSSG"

  RDSMasterUserSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RdsMasterUserSecret"
      Description: "Master user password for the RDS instance"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
        PasswordLength: 16

  MySQLRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MySQLDB"
      Engine: MySQL
      EngineVersion: "8.0.45"
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSMasterUserSecret}:SecretString:password}}"
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref RDSDBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSSecurityGroup.GroupId
      MultiAZ: false
      StorageType: gp2
      DeletionProtection: false

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: "VPC Id"
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: "Public Subnet 1 Id"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: "Public Subnet 2 Id"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  RDSSecurityGroupId:
    Description: "Security Group Id for RDS"
    Value: !GetAtt RDSSecurityGroup.GroupId
  RDSInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: "Endpoint of the MySQL RDS instance"
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLRDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RDSInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: "Identifier of the MySQL RDS instance"
    Value: !Ref MySQLRDSInstance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create a MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with
  a custom parameter group and secure network isolation. The database is deployed
  in a VPC with two private subnets (across different Availability Zones),
  integrated with AWS Secrets Manager for secure admin credentials management.

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet 1.
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet 2.
  DBAllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    Description: Allocated storage (in GB) for the RDS instance.
  DBEngineVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: "8.0"
    Description: MySQL engine version.
  DBParameterGroupFamily:
    Type: String
    Default: "mysql8.0"
    Description: Parameter group family for MySQL.
  DBInstanceIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: "MySQLDBInstance"
    Description: RDS DB instance identifier.
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: "mydatabase"
    Description: Initial database name.
  DBSecurityGroupIngressCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR allowed to access the database on MySQL port (3306).

Resources:

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2"

  RDSSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for MySQL RDS instance"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSSubnetGroup"

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for RDS instance with restricted access"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref DBSecurityGroupIngressCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSSG"

  MySQLCustomParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: "Custom MySQL parameter group for application settings"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create a secure S3 bucket with full security controls,
  plus a replicas bucket and an access logs bucket. All buckets are encrypted with AES256,
  public access is blocked, and the secure bucket has a policy that enforces secure transport.

Resources:
  SecureBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "secure-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  SecureBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref SecureBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyNonSecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${SecureBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${SecureBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  ReplicasBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "replicas-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "access-logs-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

Outputs:
  SecureBucketName:
    Description: Name of the secure bucket
    Value: !Ref SecureBucket
  ReplicasBucketName:
    Description: Name of the replicas bucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicasBucket
  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket with server-side encryption and block public access,
  a Lambda function triggered on S3:ObjectCreated:* events, and the necessary IAM role and permissions.

Resources:

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "my-s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Function: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: arn:aws:logs:*:*:*
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::my-s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::my-s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}/*"

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "s3-trigger-lambda-${AWS::StackName}"
      Handler: index.handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import logging
          
          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
          
          def handler(event, context):
              logger.info("Received event: " + json.dumps(event))
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Hello from Lambda triggered by S3!')
              }

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::my-s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template to create an SQS FIFO Queue with ContentBasedDeduplication and proper tagging.

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Description: "The name of the SQS FIFO queue. Must end with '.fifo'"
    Type: String
    Default: "MyQueue.fifo"
    AllowedPattern: ".*\\.fifo$"
    ConstraintDescription: "QueueName must end with '.fifo'."
  EnableContentBasedDeduplication:
    Description: "Indicates whether content-based deduplication is enabled."
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - "true"
      - "false"
    Default: "false"

Resources:
  SQSFifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: !If
        - IsContentBasedDeduplicationEnabled
        - true
        - false
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Conditions:
  IsContentBasedDeduplicationEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableContentBasedDeduplication, "true"]

Outputs:
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: "URL of the SQS FIFO Queue"
    Value: !Ref SQSFifoQueue
  SQSQueueARN:
    Description: "ARN of the SQS FIFO Queue"
    Value: !GetAtt SQSFifoQueue.Arn

Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create a VPC with three subnets (a pair of public and private subnets)
  spread across two Availability Zones using a static RegionMap for consistent AZ placement.

  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b

    Properties:

      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  SubnetPublicAZ1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AZ1]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SubnetPublicAZ1"

    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SubnetPrivateAZ1"

  SubnetPublicAZ2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref "AWS::Region", AZ2]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SubnetPublicAZ2"

  PublicSubnetAZ2:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption,
  a KMS key alias for simplified key management, lifecycle management rules, and organizational tags.

Resources:
  MyKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for S3 bucket encryption"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Id: key-default-1
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow administration of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action:
              - kms:Create*
              - kms:Describe*
              - kms:Enable*
              - kms:List*
              - kms:Put*
              - kms:Update*
              - kms:Revoke*
              - kms:Disable*
              - kms:Get*
              - kms:Delete*
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
            Resource: "*"

  MyKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/s3-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref MyKMSKey

  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "s3-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref MyKMSKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: "LifecycleRule"
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: ""
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: INTELLIGENT_TIERING
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Department
          Value: IT

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: "Name of the created S3 bucket"
    Value: !Ref MyS3Bucket
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: "ID of the KMS key used for bucket encryption"
    Value: !Ref MyKMSKey
  KMSAlias:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create a VPC with four subnets (two public and two private) and managed NAT gateways in each public subnet.
  All VPC-related resources are tagged for easy identification and management.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-2'

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.101.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet-1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.102.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet-2'

  # Elastic IPs for NAT Gateways
  NatEIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NatEIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  # NAT Gateways in Public Subnets
  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway-1'

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway-2'

  # Public Route Table and Route
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-RouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table and Route for PrivateSubnet1 (using NatGateway1)
  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-RouteTable-1'

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  # Private Route Table and Route for PrivateSubnet2 (using NatGateway2)
  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Private-RouteTable-2'

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
  with server-side encryption enabled using AWS managed keys and destination error logging
  configured to a CloudWatch log group and log stream.

Resources:
  FirehoseErrorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/kinesisfirehose/${AWS::StackName}/error-logs"
      RetentionInDays: 14

  FirehoseErrorLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogGroup
      LogStreamName: "firehose-error-log-stream"

  DeliveryStreamS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "firehose-destination-bucket-${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}"

  DeliveryStreamRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseS3DeliveryPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt DeliveryStreamS3Bucket.Arn
                  - !Sub "${DeliveryStreamS3Bucket.Arn}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: "*"

  DataFirehoseDeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt DeliveryStreamS3Bucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt DeliveryStreamRole.Arn
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref FirehoseErrorLogStream

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to deploy a resilient Jenkins CI/CD server on EC2 within a VPC,
  featuring automated hardware failure recovery, a static Elastic IP for consistent public access,
  secure HTTP/ICMP security group, and Systems Manager (SSM) access for secure management.

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type for the Jenkins server
    Type: String
    Default: t3.small
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    ConstraintDescription: must be a valid EC2 instance type.
  KeyName:
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access if needed (optional)
    Type: String
    Default: ""
  JenkinsPort:
    Description: Port on which Jenkins will be accessible
    Type: Number
    Default: 80

Conditions:
  HasKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, ""]]

Resources:

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsPublicSubnet

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsPublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable HTTP and ICMP access to the Jenkins server
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref JenkinsPort
          ToPort: !Ref JenkinsPort
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsSecurityGroup

  JenkinsEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  JenkinsInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Path: "/"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsInstanceRole

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsInstanceRole
      Path: "/"

  JenkinsInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      ImageId: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref JenkinsInstanceProfile
      KeyName: !If [HasKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash -xe
          yum update -y
          amazon-linux-extras install java-openjdk11 -y
          wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
          rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io.key
          yum install jenkins -y
          systemctl enable jenkins
          systemctl start jenkins
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsServer

  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt JenkinsEIP.AllocationId
      InstanceId: !Ref JenkinsInstance

  JenkinsRecoveryAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm to recover Jenkins instance if system status check fails"
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      MetricName: StatusCheckFailed_System
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref JenkinsInstance
      Statistic: Maximum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Sub "arn:aws:automate:${AWS::Region}:ec2:recover"
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: "ID of the Jenkins EC2 instance"
    Value: !Ref JenkinsInstance
  ElasticIP:
    Description: "Public Elastic IP address associated with the Jenkins server"
    Value: !Ref JenkinsEIP
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: "Public subnet ID where Jenkins is deployed"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for EC2 instances with
  restricted read-only access to AWS IAM metadata.

Resources:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "EC2-IAM-ReadOnlyRole-${AWS::Region}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "ec2.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "EC2-IAM-ReadOnlyPolicy-${AWS::Region}"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "iam:Get*"
                  - "iam:List*"
                Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for EC2 with read-only access to IAM metadata.
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to provision an AWS Glue ETL job infrastructure.
  This includes an S3 bucket for storing Glue scripts and Spark logs, an IAM role with Glue permissions to access the S3 bucket, and an AWS Glue Job configured with Glue Version 4.0 using a Python script from the bucket.

Resources:
  GlueBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  GlueJobRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GlueS3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${GlueBucket}"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${GlueBucket}/*"

  GlueETLJob:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Job
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-GlueETLJob"
      Role: !GetAtt GlueJobRole.Arn
      GlueVersion: "4.0"
      Command:
        Name: glueetl
        ScriptLocation: !Sub "s3://${GlueBucket}/gue_scripts/sample_convert.py"
        PythonVersion: "3"
      MaxRetries: 0
      DefaultArguments:
        --job-language: python
        --enable-metrics: "true"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template for a scalable URL-to-PNG screenshot service with S3/SQS integration,
  auto scaling EC2 worker instances across two Availability Zones, CloudWatch alarms based on SQS queue depth,
  and a dedicated load test EC2 instance to simulate traffic.

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access to the instances
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: my-key-pair
  WorkerInstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type for worker instances
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
  LoadTestInstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type for the load testing instance
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro

Mappings:
  AWSRegionToAMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-08962a4068733a2b6
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-047bb4163c506cd98

Resources:

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScalableScreenshotVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WorkerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for worker instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WorkerSG

  LoadTestSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for load testing instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadTestSG

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotBucket

  SQSDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt SQSDeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5

  WorkerInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2RoleforSSM
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: WorkerPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "arn:aws:logs:*:*:*"

  WorkerInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      Roles:
        - !Ref WorkerInstanceRole

  LoadTestInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2RoleforSSM
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LoadTestPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: "arn:aws:logs:*:*:*"

  LoadTestInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      Roles:
        - !Ref LoadTestInstanceRole

  WorkerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "WorkerLaunchTemplate-${AWS::StackName}"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        InstanceType: !Ref WorkerInstanceType
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AWSRegionToAMI, !Ref AWS::Region, AMI]
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref WorkerInstanceProfile
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref WorkerSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64:
            Fn::Sub:
              - |
                #!/bin/bash -xe
                yum update -y
                amazon-linux-extras install -y epel
                yum install -y chromium aws-cli
                REGION='${AWS::Region}'
                QUEUE_URL='${QUEUE_URL}'
                BUCKET='${BUCKET}'
                while true; do
                  MESSAGE=$(aws sqs receive-message --queue-url ${QUEUE_URL} --max-number-of-messages 1 --region ${AWS::Region} --output text --query "Messages[0].Body")
                  if [ ! -z "$MESSAGE" ]; then
                    FILENAME="/tmp/$(date +%s).png"
                    chromium --headless --screenshot=$FILENAME --window-size=1280,720 "$MESSAGE"
                    aws s3 cp $FILENAME s3://${BUCKET}/
                    RECEIPT_HANDLE=$(aws sqs receive-message --queue-url ${QUEUE_URL} --region ${AWS::Region} --output text --query "Messages[0].ReceiptHandle")
                    if [ ! -z "$RECEIPT_HANDLE" ]; then
                      aws sqs delete-message --queue-url ${QUEUE_URL} --receipt-handle "$RECEIPT_HANDLE" --region ${AWS::Region}
                    fi
                  fi
                  sleep 10
                done
              - {QUEUE_URL: !Ref SQSQueue, BUCKET: !Ref S3Bucket}

  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WorkerLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WorkerLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WorkerInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  ScaleUpPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref AutoScalingGroup
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      ScalingAdjustment: 1
      Cooldown: 300

  ScaleDownPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref AutoScalingGroup
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      ScalingAdjustment: -1
      Cooldown: 300

  SQSQueueHighAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: SQSQueueHighDepthAlarm
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.QueueName
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleUpPolicy

  SQSQueueLowAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: SQSQueueLowDepthAlarm
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 2
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.QueueName
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleDownPolicy

  LoadTestInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref LoadTestInstanceType
      ImageId: !FindInMap [AWSRegionToAMI, !Ref AWS::Region, AMI]
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref LoadTestInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref LoadTestSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          Fn::Sub:
            - |
              #!/bin/bash -xe
              yum update -y
              yum install -y aws-cli
              REGION='${AWS::Region}'
              QUEUE_URL='${QUEUE_URL}'
              while true; do
                aws sqs send-message --queue-url ${QUEUE_URL} --message-body "https://example.com" --region ${AWS::Region}
                sleep 5
              done
            - {QUEUE_URL: !Ref SQSQueue}

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket storing screenshots
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue for screenshot requests
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: The name of the Auto Scaling Group for worker instances
    Value: !Ref AutoScalingGroup
  LoadTestInstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID of the load testing EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref LoadTestInstance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template for multi-region application failover architecture using
  Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller (ARC). This template creates an ARC
  recovery cluster, a control panel, two routing controls (one per region), an assertion
  safety rule to enforce at least one active region, and Route 53 health checks for each
  regional endpoint.

Parameters:
  RegionOne:
    Description: "AWS Region for the first routing control."
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1
    AllowedValues:
      - us-east-1
      - us-west-1
      - us-west-2
      - eu-west-1
      - eu-central-1
  RegionTwo:
    Description: "AWS Region for the second routing control."
    Type: String
    Default: us-west-2
    AllowedValues:
      - us-east-1
      - us-west-1
      - us-west-2
      - eu-west-1
      - eu-central-1
  RegionOneEndpoint:
    Description: "DNS name of the endpoint to health check in the first region."
    Type: String
    Default: "www.example-us-east-1.com"
  RegionTwoEndpoint:
    Description: "DNS name of the endpoint to health check in the second region."
    Type: String
    Default: "www.example-us-west-2.com"

Resources:
  ARCRecoveryCluster:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::Cluster
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RecoveryCluster"

  ARCControlPanel:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::ControlPanel
    Properties:
      ClusterArn: !Ref ARCRecoveryCluster
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ControlPanel"

  RoutingControlRegionOne:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::RoutingControl
    Properties:
      ClusterArn: !Ref ARCRecoveryCluster
      ControlPanelArn: !Ref ARCControlPanel
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${RegionOne}-RoutingControl"

  RoutingControlRegionTwo:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::RoutingControl
    Properties:
      ClusterArn: !Ref ARCRecoveryCluster
      ControlPanelArn: !Ref ARCControlPanel
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${RegionTwo}-RoutingControl"

  SafetyRuleAssertion:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::SafetyRule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AtLeastOneActiveRegion"
      ControlPanelArn: !Ref ARCControlPanel
      RuleConfig:
        Threshold: 1
        Inverted: false
        Type: ATLEAST
      AssertionRule:
        WaitPeriodMs: 10000
        AssertedControls:
          - !Ref RoutingControlRegionOne
          - !Ref RoutingControlRegionTwo

  HealthCheckRegionOne:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HealthCheck
    Properties:
      HealthCheckConfig:
        Type: HTTP
        FullyQualifiedDomainName: !Ref RegionOneEndpoint
        ResourcePath: /
        RequestInterval: 30
        FailureThreshold: 3

  HealthCheckRegionTwo:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HealthCheck
    Properties:
      HealthCheckConfig:
        Type: HTTP
        FullyQualifiedDomainName: !Ref RegionTwoEndpoint
        ResourcePath: /
        RequestInterval: 30
        FailureThreshold: 3

Outputs:
  ControlPanelArn:
    Description: "ARN of the ARC Control Panel."
    Value: !Ref ARCControlPanel
  RoutingControlRegionOneID:
    Description: "Routing Control ID for region one."
    Value: !Ref RoutingControlRegionOne
  RoutingControlRegionTwoID:
    Description: "Routing Control ID for region two."
    Value: !Ref RoutingControlRegionTwo
  SafetyRuleID:
    Description: "Safety Rule resource ID."
    Value: !Ref SafetyRuleAssertion
  HealthCheckRegionOneID:
    Description: "Health Check ID for region one."
    Value: !Ref HealthCheckRegionOne
  HealthCheckRegionTwoID:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an EMR Serverless environment.
  It provisions an IAM role with permissions for S3 and CloudWatch Logs,
  a secure private S3 bucket for scripts and data (with encryption, versioning, and public access blocked),
  and an EMR Serverless Spark application (release label emr-6.15.0) configured with auto-start and auto-stop.

Parameters:
  BucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "emrsrv"
    Description: "Prefix for the S3 bucket name. Must be between 3 and 63 characters, lower-case letters only."

Resources:

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketPrefix}-bucket"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyNonEncryptedConnection
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Join ["", [!GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn, "/*"]]
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "false"

  EMRServerlessRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EMRServerlessRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: emr-serverless.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EMRServerlessAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !Join ["", [!GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn, "/*"]]
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/emr/serverless/*"

  EMRServerlessSparkApp:
    Type: AWS::EMRServerless::Application
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EMRServerlessSparkApp"
      ReleaseLabel: emr-6.15.0
      Type: Spark
      AutoStartConfiguration:
        Enabled: true
      AutoStopConfiguration:
        IdleTimeoutMinutes: 15

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create a centralized SNS topic with secure cross-service notification capabilities,
  server-side encryption, and an email subscription for aggregating alerts and events from AWS services.

Parameters:
  SNSKmsKeyId:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN or ID of the KMS key to use for SNS topic encryption.
    Default: alias/aws/sns
  SNSEmail:
    Type: String
    Description: Email address to subscribe for alert notifications.
    Default: user@example.com

Resources:
  SNSCentralTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: CentralizedAlertsTopic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSKmsKeyId
      DisplayName: Centralized Alerts Channel

  SNSCentralTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSCentralTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAuthorizedServices
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
                - config.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:Subscribe
            Resource: !Ref SNSCentralTopic

  EmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref SNSEmail
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSCentralTopic

Outputs:
  SNSCentralTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the centralized SNS topic
    Value: !Ref SNSCentralTopic
  EmailSubscriptionEndpoint:
    Description: Email endpoint subscribed to the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref EmailSubscription

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  A foundational Amazon ECS cluster with optional monitoring capabilities.
  This template creates an ECS Cluster identified by a user-defined name and,
  when enabled, provisions monitoring resources including a CloudWatch Log Group
  and CloudWatch Alarms for key ECS metrics.

Parameters:
  ECSClusterName:
    Description: "The name of the ECS Cluster."
    Type: String
    Default: "BasicECSCluster"
  MonitoringEnabled:
    Description: "Set to 'true' to enable monitoring resources, 'false' otherwise."
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - "true"
      - "false"
    Default: "false"

Conditions:
  EnableMonitoring: !Equals [!Ref MonitoringEnabled, "true"]

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref ECSClusterName
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ECSLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Condition: EnableMonitoring
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/ecs/container-logs/${AWS::Region}/${AWS::AccountId}"
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ECSCPUAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Condition: EnableMonitoring
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "ECS-Cluster-CPUUtilization-${AWS::StackName}"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when average CPU utilization for the ECS cluster exceeds 80%."
      Namespace: AWS/ECS
      MetricName: CPUUtilization
      Dimensions:
        - Name: ClusterName
          Value: !Ref ECSClusterName
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: missing

  ECSMemoryAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Condition: EnableMonitoring
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "ECS-Cluster-MemoryUtilization-${AWS::StackName}"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when average Memory utilization for the ECS cluster exceeds 80%."
      Namespace: AWS/ECS
      MetricName: MemoryUtilization
      Dimensions:
        - Name: ClusterName
          Value: !Ref ECSClusterName
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: missing

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: "The name of the ECS Cluster created."
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  LogGroupName:
    Description: "The name of the CloudWatch Log Group for ECS container logs (if monitoring enabled)."
    Value: !If
      - EnableMonitoring
      - !Ref ECSLogGroup
      - "Monitoring is disabled"
  CPUAlarmName:
    Description: "The name of the CloudWatch CPU Utilization Alarm (if monitoring enabled)."
    Value: !If
      - EnableMonitoring
      - !Ref ECSCPUAlarm
      - "Monitoring is disabled"
  MemoryAlarmName:
    Description: "The name of the CloudWatch Memory Utilization Alarm (if monitoring enabled)."
    Value: !If
      - EnableMonitoring
      - !Ref ECSMemoryAlarm
      - "Monitoring is disabled"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create a scalable and monitored Amazon EFS file system with
  highly available mount targets, conditional automated backups via AWS Backup using a
  customizable CRON schedule, and CloudWatch alarms to proactively monitor IO utilization,
  burst credits, and throughput thresholds in a VPC-based environment.

Parameters:
  VPCID:
    Description: "The VPC ID in which to deploy EFS and mount targets. This value is dynamically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store."
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::VPC::Id>
    Default: "/my/default/vpc-id"
  SubnetIds:
    Description: "The list of Subnet IDs for EFS mount targets. Must include at least two valid subnets. This value is dynamically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store."
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>>
    Default: "/my/default/subnet-ids"
    MinLength: 2
  Environment:
    Description: "Environment name tag (e.g., Production, Staging)."
    Type: String
    Default: "Production"
  BackupEnabled:
    Description: "Set to 'yes' to enable automated backups via AWS Backup, 'no' to disable."
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - yes
      - no
    Default: no
  BackupCronSchedule:
    Description: "CRON expression for the automated backup schedule (if backups are enabled)."
    Type: String
    Default: "cron(0 5 * * ? *)"

Conditions:
  EnableBackup: !Equals [!Ref BackupEnabled, "yes"]

Resources:

  EFSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "Security group for EFS in ${Environment} environment"
      VpcId: !Ref VPCID
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFS-SG"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFS"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  MountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Select [0, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSSecurityGroup

  MountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Select [1, !Ref SubnetIds]
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSSecurityGroup

  EFSBurstCreditAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSBurstCreditAlarm"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when EFS Burst Credit Balance falls below threshold."
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: BurstCreditBalance
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 500
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSBurstCreditAlarm"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EFSIOUtilizationAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSIOUtilizationAlarm"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when EFS IO Utilization (DataReadBytes) exceeds threshold."
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: DataReadBytes
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 10000000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSIOUtilizationAlarm"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EFSThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSThroughputAlarm"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when EFS Throughput (DataWriteBytes) exceeds threshold."
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: DataWriteBytes
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 10000000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSThroughputAlarm"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  BackupRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Condition: EnableBackup
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: backup.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBackupServiceRolePolicyForBackup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BackupRole"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EFSBackupPlan:
    Type: AWS::Backup::BackupPlan
    Condition: EnableBackup
    Properties:
      BackupPlan:
        BackupPlanName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EFSBackupPlan"
        BackupPlanRule:
          - RuleName: EFSBackupRule
            TargetBackupVault: default
            ScheduleExpression: !Ref BackupCronSchedule
            StartWindowMinutes: 60
            CompletionWindowMinutes: 120
            Lifecycle:
              DeleteAfterDays: 30
      BackupPlanTags:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an Amazon Kinesis Data Stream for real-time data ingestion and processing,
  along with CloudWatch Alarms that monitor read and write throughput exceeding defined thresholds.

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis Data Stream.
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1

  DataRetentionPeriodHours:
    Description: Data retention period in hours for the Kinesis Data Stream.
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 24
    MaxValue: 168

  ReadThroughputThreshold:
    Description: Threshold for the read throughput alarm (number of read capacity violations).
    Type: Number
    Default: 50

  WriteThroughputThreshold:
    Description: Threshold for the write throughput alarm (number of write capacity violations).
    Type: Number
    Default: 50

Resources:

  KinesisDataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "KinesisStream-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref DataRetentionPeriodHours

  ReadThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "KinesisReadThroughputAlarm-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when read throughput (ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded) exceeds the threshold."
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisDataStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Ref ReadThroughputThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  WriteThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "KinesisWriteThroughputAlarm-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when write throughput (WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded) exceeds the threshold."
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisDataStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Ref WriteThroughputThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamName:
    Description: "The name of the Kinesis Data Stream."
    Value: !Ref KinesisDataStream
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-KinesisStreamName"

  ReadThroughputAlarmARN:
    Description: "The ARN of the CloudWatch Alarm for read throughput."
    Value: !GetAtt ReadThroughputAlarm.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ReadThroughputAlarmARN"

  WriteThroughputAlarmARN:
    Description: "The ARN of the CloudWatch Alarm for write throughput."
    Value: !GetAtt WriteThroughputAlarm.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-WriteThroughputAlarmARN"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an AWS KMS key for centralized encryption management,
  including an alias and a KeyPolicy that follows the principle of least privilege.

Resources:
  CentralizedEncryptionKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for centralized encryption management."
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: "AllowAdministrationOfTheKey"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "AllowUseOfTheKey"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action:
              - "kms:Encrypt"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:ReEncrypt*"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
              - "kms:DescribeKey"
            Resource: "*"

  CentralizedEncryptionKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: "alias/centralized-encryption-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CentralizedEncryptionKMSKey

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with two publicly accessible
  db.t3.large instances and a custom DB cluster parameter group enforcing settings like time_zone
  and sql_mode. NOTE: You must supply valid public subnet IDs (in at least two different Availability Zones)
  from your target region for the DBSubnetIds parameter during stack creation.

Parameters:
  DBUsername:
    Description: The database admin account username.
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  DBSecretName:
    Description: The name of the AWS Secrets Manager secret storing the database admin password.
    Type: String
    Default: aurora-mysql-secret
  DBSubnetIds:
    Description: >
      A comma-delimited list of at least two public subnet IDs for the Aurora cluster.
      You must provide valid subnet IDs from your target region.
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>

Resources:
  AuroraDBClusterParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Custom parameter group for Aurora MySQL enforcing time_zone and sql_mode settings.
      Family: aurora-mysql5.7
      Parameters:
        time_zone: "UTC"
        sql_mode: "STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION"

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Public subnet group for Aurora MySQL Cluster."
      SubnetIds: !Ref DBSubnetIds

  AuroraDBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: "5.7.mysql_aurora.2.11.3"
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Ref AuroraDBClusterParameterGroup
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${DBSecretName}:SecretString:password}}"
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: "07:00-09:00"

  AuroraDBInstance1:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      PubliclyAccessible: true

  AuroraDBInstance2:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      PubliclyAccessible: true

Outputs:
  DBClusterArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Aurora MySQL DB Cluster"
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.DBClusterArn
  DBClusterEndpoint:
    Description: "Endpoint address of the Aurora MySQL DB Cluster"
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.Endpoint.Address
  Instance1Identifier:
    Description: "Identifier of the first DB instance"
    Value: !Ref AuroraDBInstance1
  Instance2Identifier:
    Description: "Identifier of the second DB instance"
    Value: !Ref AuroraDBInstance2

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation Template to create a multi-AZ Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with two publicly accessible instances, CloudWatch Logs integration, and secure secret management via AWS Secrets Manager.

Parameters:
  VPCId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: "The VPC ID where the Aurora cluster will be deployed."
  DBSubnetIds:
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>
    Description: "A list of two subnet IDs (in different Availability Zones) for the DBSubnetGroup."
  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    Description: "The master username for the Aurora cluster."
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: "mydatabase"
    Description: "The initial database name for the Aurora cluster."

Resources:
  AuroraDBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPCId
      GroupDescription: "Security group for the Aurora MySQL Cluster"
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-sg"

  AuroraDBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for the Aurora MySQL Cluster"
      SubnetIds: !Ref DBSubnetIds
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-subnet-group"

  AuroraDBSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-secret"
      Description: "Aurora MySQL master credentials"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username":"${DBUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        ExcludeCharacters: "\"@/\\"

  AuroraDBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref AuroraDBSecret
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref AuroraDBSubnetGroup
      DatabaseName: !Ref DBName
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: "07:00-09:00"
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: "mon:08:00-mon:09:00"
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref AuroraDBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-cluster"

  AuroraDBInstance1:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-instance-1"

  AuroraDBInstance2:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-instance-2"

Outputs:
  DBClusterEndpoint:
    Description: "The endpoint address of the Aurora cluster."
    Value: !Join ["", ["", !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.Endpoint, ""]]
  DBReaderEndpoint:
    Description: "The reader endpoint address of the Aurora cluster."
    Value: !Join ["", ["", !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.ReadEndpoint, ""]]

      EnableDnsHostnames: true

        - Key: Name

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an Amazon S3 bucket with server-side encryption,
  public access blocked, and a dynamic bucket policy that grants access either for an
  entire AWS Organization/OU (when OrganizationId is provided) or for a single account.

Metadata:
  AWS::CloudFormation::Interface:
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: "Organization Settings"
        Parameters:
          - OrganizationId
    ParameterLabels:
      OrganizationId:
        default: "AWS Organization or Organization Unit ID (Leave empty for single-account access)"

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Description: "AWS Organization or Organization Unit ID to grant enterprise-wide access. Leave empty for single-account use."
    Type: String
    Default: ""

Conditions:
  UseOrgPrincipal: !Not [!Equals [!Ref OrganizationId, ""]]

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "org-access-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement: !If
          - UseOrgPrincipal
          - - Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action:
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:PutObject
                - s3:DeleteObject
              Resource:
                - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
                - !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
          - - Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              Action:
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:PutObject
                - s3:DeleteObject
              Resource:
                - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
                - !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
