final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation Template for an Encrypted Amazon EFS File System with automated monitoring,
  cross-AZ EC2 instance integration, centralized shared storage, and secure management via SSM.

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access to the instances.
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
  InstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro

Mappings:
  AWSRegionToAMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0aeeebd8d2ab47354
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-07ebfd5b3428b6f4

Resources:

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SharedStorageVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SharedStorageIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet-1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet-2

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EFSClientSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances to access EFS and outbound internet access.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSClientSecurityGroup

  EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount targets to allow inbound NFS traffic from EC2 instances.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SharedEFS
      FileSystemPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTLS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "elasticfilesystem:*"
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "false"

  EFSMountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  EFSMountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ['ec2.amazonaws.com']
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess
      Path: /

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole
      Path: /

  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      ImageId: !FindInMap
        - AWSRegionToAMI
        - !Ref AWS::Region
        - AMI
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          !Sub:
            - |-
                #!/bin/bash
                yum update -y
                yum install -y amazon-efs-utils
                REGION=${AWS::Region}
                if [ -d "/home" ]; then
                  mkdir -p /home_backup
                  mv /home/* /home_backup/ || true
                fi
                mkdir -p /home
                echo "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com:/  /home  efs  _netdev,tls  0  0" >> /etc/fstab
                mount -a
            - {EFSFileSystem: !Ref EFSFileSystem}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2Instance-1

  EC2Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      ImageId: !FindInMap
        - AWSRegionToAMI
        - !Ref AWS::Region
        - AMI
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64:
          !Sub:
            - |-
                #!/bin/bash
                yum update -y
                yum install -y amazon-efs-utils
                REGION=${AWS::Region}
                if [ -d "/home" ]; then
                  mkdir -p /home_backup
                  mv /home/* /home_backup/ || true
                fi
                mkdir -p /home
                echo "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com:/  /home  efs  _netdev,tls  0  0" >> /etc/fstab
                mount -a
            - {EFSFileSystem: !Ref EFSFileSystem}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2Instance-2

  EFSBurstCreditBalanceAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm if EFS Burst Credit Balance falls below threshold."
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: BurstCreditBalance
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1000000
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  EFSDatapointsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm if EFS DataWriteIOBytes exceeds threshold indicating potential throughput issues."
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: DataWriteIOBytes
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 10000000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC Id
    Value: !Ref VPC
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: Encrypted EFS File System Id
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
  EC2Instance1Id:
    Description: EC2 Instance in Public Subnet 1 Id
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance1
  EC2Instance2Id:
    Description: EC2 Instance in Public Subnet 2 Id
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance2
  EFSClientSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group Id for EC2 instances
    Value: !Ref EFSClientSecurityGroup
  EFSMountTargetSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group Id for EFS mount targets
    Value: !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template for a minimal Redis caching solution with an EC2 instance accessible via AWS Systems Manager (SSM). 
  It deploys a VPC, two subnets (one public for EC2 and one additional for ElastiCache), an Internet Gateway with a public route table,
  security groups for EC2 and ElastiCache, an ElastiCache subnet group, an SSM-enabled EC2 instance, and a Redis ElastiCache replication group.

Parameters:
  AmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-ebs'
    Description: 'Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID from SSM Parameter Store'

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  ElastiCacheSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CacheSubnet"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Public-RT"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  CacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: "Subnet group for ElastiCache cluster"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSubnet
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cache-subnet-group"

  EC2InstanceSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security Group for EC2 instance with SSM access"
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress: []
      # By default, all outbound traffic is allowed
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2-SG"

  ElastiCacheSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security Group for Redis ElastiCache; allows inbound from EC2 instance"
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 6379
          ToPort: 6379
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2InstanceSG
      # By default, all outbound traffic is allowed
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Cache-SG"

  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2-Role"

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole
      Path: /

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceSG
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2"

  RedisReplicationGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupDescription: "Redis replication group for minimal cache"
      ReplicationGroupId: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-redis"
      Engine: redis
      CacheNodeType: cache.t3.micro
      NumCacheClusters: 2
      AutomaticFailoverEnabled: true
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref CacheSubnetGroup
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSG
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-redis"

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: "Public Subnet ID for EC2 instance"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
  CacheSubnetGroupName:
    Description: "ElastiCache Subnet Group Name"
    Value: !Ref CacheSubnetGroup
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 Instance ID"
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  RedisReplicationGroupId:
    Description: "Redis Replication Group ID"
    Value: !Ref RedisReplicationGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  AWS CloudFormation template to deploy a Bedrock Agent integrated with a Lambda function 
  for automated stock price lookup capabilities. The Lambda function returns a hard‐coded 
  stock price (100) as a placeholder for future business logic. The Bedrock Agent is configured 
  with a foundational AI model specified by a valid ARN, and is set up with a custom action group 
  "getStockPrice". A separate Lambda permission resource grants the Bedrock Agent permission 
  to invoke the Lambda function, ensuring secure service-to-service communication.

Parameters:
  FoundationModelArn:
    Description: "ARN for the foundation model (e.g., Claude 3 Sonnet v1). Please provide a valid ARN."
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:bedrock:us-east-1:123456789012:foundation-model/claude-3-sonnet-v1"

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "StockPriceLambdaExecutionRole-${AWS::StackName}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  StockPriceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "StockPriceLambda-${AWS::StackName}"
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Runtime: python3.11
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              # Return a hard-coded stock price as a placeholder for future business logic.
              return {
                  "statusCode": 200,
                  "body": {
                      "price": 100
                  }
              }

  BedrockAgentRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "BedrockAgentRole-${AWS::StackName}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: "*"

  BedrockAgent:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::Agent
    Properties:
      AgentName: !Sub "BedrockAgent-${AWS::StackName}"
      FoundationModel: !Ref FoundationModelArn
      Instruction: "Handle stock-related queries via the custom action 'getStockPrice'."
      AgentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt BedrockAgentRole.Arn
      ActionGroups:
        - ActionGroupName: "getStockPrice"

  LambdaBedrockInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      FunctionName: !Ref StockPriceLambda
      Principal: bedrock.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt BedrockAgent.AgentArn

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Stock Price Lambda function"
    Value: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
  BedrockAgentId:
    Description: "Identifier of the Bedrock Agent"
    Value: !Ref BedrockAgent

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation Template to provision a secure and scalable Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with
  RDS Proxy integration, along with a VPC (with public and private subnets), Security Groups,
  Secrets Manager credentials, IAM roles for enhanced monitoring and secure secret retrieval,
  and observability features (CloudWatch logging, enhanced monitoring, and performance insights).

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.
  PublicSubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the public subnet.
  PrivateSubnetACIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the first private subnet.
  PrivateSubnetBCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the second private subnet.
  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: db.r5.large
    Description: RDS instance class for Aurora cluster instances.
  EngineVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: "5.7.mysql_aurora.2.10.2"
    Description: Aurora MySQL engine version.
  DBPort:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3306
    Description: Port for the Aurora cluster.
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    Description: Days to retain backups.
  MonitoringInterval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    Description: Enhanced monitoring interval in seconds.

Resources:

  # VPC and Networking
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnetCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs[!Ref AWS::Region]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraPublicSubnet

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnetACIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs[!Ref AWS::Region]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraPrivateSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnetBCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs[!Ref AWS::Region]]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraPrivateSubnetB

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraPublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  ElasticIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    DependsOn: PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt ElasticIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraNATGateway

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraPrivateRouteTable

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Security Groups

  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora MySQL cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref DBPort
          ToPort: !Ref DBPort
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref DBPort
          ToPort: !Ref DBPort
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref RDSProxySecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraClusterSG

  LambdaSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Lambda functions accessing RDS Proxy
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LambdaAccessSG

  RDSProxySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS Proxy endpoints
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref DBPort
          ToPort: !Ref DBPort
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: RDSProxySG

  # Secrets Manager for Database Credentials

  DBSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: AuroraDBCredentials
      Description: "Credentials for the Aurora MySQL cluster"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "dbadmin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
        PasswordLength: 16

  # IAM Roles

  AuroraMonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole

  RDSProxyIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RDSProxySecretsManagerAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Ref DBSecret

  # DB Subnet Group for Aurora Cluster

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for Aurora MySQL cluster"
      SubnetIds: [!Ref PrivateSubnetA, !Ref PrivateSubnetB]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraDBSubnetGroup

  # Aurora MySQL Cluster

  AuroraDBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: !Ref EngineVersion
      DatabaseName: sampledb
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds: [!Ref AuroraSecurityGroup]
      MasterUsername: !Join ["", ["{{resolve:secretsmanager:",!Ref DBSecret,":SecretString:username}}"]]
      MasterUserPassword: !Join ["", ["{{resolve:secretsmanager:",!Ref DBSecret,":SecretString:password}}"]]
      Port: !Ref DBPort
      StorageEncrypted: true
      EnableIAMDatabaseAuthentication: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      PreferredBackupWindow: "07:00-09:00"
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: "mon:09:00-mon:09:30"
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports: ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"]
      MonitoringInterval: !Ref MonitoringInterval
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt AuroraMonitoringRole.Arn
      PerformanceInsightsEnabled: true

  AuroraDBInstancePrimary:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraDBInstancePrimary

  AuroraDBInstanceReader:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraDBCluster
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraDBInstanceReader

  # RDS Proxy
  RDSProxy:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxy
    Properties:
      DBProxyName: AuroraRDSProxy
      EngineFamily: MYSQL
      IdleClientTimeout: 1800
      RequireTLS: true
      RoleArn: !GetAtt RDSProxyIAMRole.Arn
      VpcSubnetIds: [!Ref PrivateSubnetA, !Ref PrivateSubnetB]
      VpcSecurityGroupIds: [!Ref RDSProxySecurityGroup]
      Auth:
        - AuthScheme: SECRETS
          Description: "Authentication using Secrets Manager"  #  Fixed spacing before comment
          IAMAuth: ENABLED
          SecretArn: !Ref DBSecret
          ClientPasswordAuthType: MYSQL_NATIVE_PASSWORD
      DebugLogging: true

Outputs:
  AuroraClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora DB Cluster endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraDBCluster.Endpoint.Address
  RDSProxyEndpoint:
    Description: RDS Proxy endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt RDSProxy.Endpoint
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC Id
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PrivateSubnets:
    Description: Private Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [", ", [!Ref PrivateSubnetA, !Ref PrivateSubnetB]]
